items.summary: Implement a local authentication account system (signup, login, session management) using localStorage — similar to the version 33 approach — so users can register and log in without relying on Internet Identity. The system must store user profiles with INR/USDT balances and persist session state across page reloads.

Remove all 'Failed', 'Error', or failure-state messages and indicators from the login/signup flow and account system UI. Instead of showing failure notifications (e.g., 'Login failed', 'Signup failed', error toasts), silently handle errors or show only neutral/pending feedback to the user.

On the Login/Signup page (LoginPage.tsx), ensure the tab-based form UI continues to work correctly with the updated local auth system, including input validation and spinner feedback, but without any failure/error toast notifications or inline error messages.
